flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Middlebury College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (83.7% → 65.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Middlebury College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $67.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Middlebury College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.8k → $67.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Middlebury College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).
